description: User selects 'Multiple choice' from the 'Add a custom screening question' dropdown menu.
page_title: Askable Website Test - Create Interview Study
frame_description: The user is on the 'Custom screener' page and selects the 'Multiple choice' option from an open dropdown menu.

description: A modal window titled 'Multiple Choice' appears on top of the page.
frame_description: A modal overlay for creating a multiple-choice screener question appears over the main content.

description: User types the question 'Which best describes your habits for how you interact with TV streaming services?' into the screener question text area.
frame_description: The user is typing into the 'Screener question' text field within the Multiple Choice modal.

description: User clicks on the first answer input field to focus it.
frame_description: The cursor clicks into the first answer option field in the modal.

description: User types 'I don't use them at all' as the first answer option.
frame_description: Text is being entered into the first answer field.

description: User clicks on the second answer input field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks into the second answer option field.

description: User types 'I use them a few times per week' as the second answer option.
frame_description: Text is being entered into the second answer field.

description: User clicks on the third answer input field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks into the third answer option field.

description: User types 'I use them daily' as the third answer option.
frame_description: Text is being entered into the third answer field.

description: User clicks on the fourth answer input field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks into the fourth answer option field.

description: User types 'I use them multiple times per day' as the fourth answer option.
frame_description: Text is being entered into the fourth answer field.

description: User moves the cursor to the 'Save' button and pauses.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the 'Save' button at the bottom of the modal.

description: User clicks the 'Save' button to add the question.
frame_description: The 'Save' button is clicked.

description: The modal closes and the new multiple-choice question appears in the list on the 'Custom screener' page.
frame_description: The modal disappears, and the 'Custom screener' page updates to show the newly created question card.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom of the page.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the next step of the setup.

description: The browser navigates to the 'Your Timezone' section of the study setup.
frame_description: The page URL changes and the screen begins to load the 'Your Timezone' section.

description: The 'Your Timezone' page content, including a dropdown for selecting a timezone, finishes rendering.
frame_description: The 'Your Timezone' page is fully loaded, showing a timezone selection dropdown.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Audience' link in the left-hand navigation sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the sidebar and pauses over the 'Audience' menu item.

description: User clicks the 'Audience' link to return to the previous section.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Audience' link in the sidebar.

description: The browser navigates back to the 'Custom screener' page.
frame_description: The page navigates back to the 'Custom screener' section.

description: The 'Custom screener' page content, showing the previously added question, finishes loading.
frame_description: The 'Custom screener' page is reloaded, displaying the question card created earlier.

description: User hovers over the '+ Add another custom question' button.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the button to add a new question.

description: User clicks the '+ Add another custom question' button.
frame_description: The button is clicked.

description: A dropdown menu appears with options: 'Multiple Choice', 'Short answer', and 'Copy from other study'.
frame_description: A dropdown menu opens below the button.

description: User hovers over the 'Copy from other study' option.
frame_description: The cursor moves down the dropdown menu to 'Copy from other study'.

description: User selects 'Copy from other study'.
frame_description: The user selects the 'Copy from other study' option.

description: A modal titled 'Select a study to copy from' appears with a red loading spinner in the center.
frame_description: A new modal opens with a loading animation.

description: The loading spinner disappears and a list of previous studies is displayed in the modal.
frame_description: The loading spinner is replaced by a list of study items.

description: User scrolls down through the list of studies.
frame_description: The content within the modal is scrolled vertically.

description: User hovers over the 'X' close button in the top right corner of the modal.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the close icon of the modal.

description: User clicks the close button.
frame_description: The close button is clicked.

description: The 'Select a study to copy from' modal closes.
frame_description: The modal overlay disappears.

description: User clicks the '+ Add another custom question' button again.
frame_description: The user clicks the button to add another question.

description: The dropdown menu with question types reappears.
frame_description: The question type dropdown menu opens again.

description: User hovers over the 'Short answer' option.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the 'Short answer' option in the dropdown.

description: User selects 'Short answer'.
frame_description: The user selects the 'Short answer' option.

description: A modal titled 'Short answer' appears.
frame_description: A modal for creating a short-answer question opens.

description: User types 'What is the name of your favourite' into the screener question field.
frame_description: The user begins typing a new question into the Short Answer modal.
